node_5.subject: Abigail Chen
node_5.description: This is Abigail Chen's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, have breakfast and check emails from 8:30 am to 9:00 am, work on the animation project for the client from 9:00 am to 12:00 pm, take a break for lunch and a short walk from 12:00 pm to 1:00 pm, continue working on the animation project from 1:00 pm to 4:00 pm, experiment with different tools and techniques for interactive art from 4:00 pm to 6:00 pm, have dinner at 6:00 pm, unwind and relax by watching a show or reading from 7:00 pm to 8:00 pm.
